title: Zapier to Monday Phone Number field invalid
excerpt: I’m experiencing an issue where certain phone numbers, specifically in the format +‪353xxxxxxxxx, are being flagged as invalid when sending data from Zapier to Monday. Interestingly, this problem seems to be isolated to …

posts.author: rantipuesto (reinu)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m experiencing an issue where certain phone numbers, specifically in the format +‪353xxxxxxxxx, are being flagged as invalid when sending data from Zapier to Monday. Interestingly, this problem seems to be isolated to three specific numbers while others are submitted with no problems, although I can’t confirm this definitively.

Format of other numbers that were submitted successful:
+‪353 xx xxx xxxx

Formats I’ve tried for the invalid numbers:‪
353xxxxxxxxx
+‪353xxxxxxxxx
+‪353 xx xxx xxxx
353xxxxxxxxx IE
+‪353xxxxxxxxx IE

After trying different formats those specific numbers are still flagged as invalid.

posts.author: Malachi (Malachi Allred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sorry to hear your having issues with Zapier. With zzBots you shouldn’t run into issues syncing the phone number field. All these different formats should sync correctly from zzBots to Monday.com.

If your interested or need help setting up, just chat with us on our website.
